sentence: Members agreed to add language to this effect in the postmeeting statement in order to convey explicitly the range of factors that they would consider in determining future monetary policy actions.

In addition, members agreed that they would continue reducing the Federal Reserve's holdings of Treasury securities, agency debt, and agency MBS, as described in the Plans for Reducing the Size of the Federal Reserve's Balance Sheet that were issued in May.
The Committee expects to maintain an accommodative stance of monetary policy until these outcomes are achieved.
Since then, the economy has made progress toward these goals.
While concerns remain in all of these areas, it appears that risks have moderated somewhat.

Bank reserves, together with currency, make up the narrowest definition of money, the monetary base; as you would expect, this measure of money has risen significantly as the Fed's balance sheet has expanded.
source: The Crisis and the Policy Response
